name: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh

hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 1.01 km from property

snippets.snippet: Pengalaman nginap pertama kali sangat puas..
They let me keep my big bag here while i was in Palau Weh.
Nice place, simple but good value, good location.
I really like this place, it will be my regular for Acheh.

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Highly recommended for those looking for affordable accommodation with the best facilities.
comments.originalComment: Sangat direkomendasikan bagi orang yang mencari penginapan murah namun dengan fasilitas terbaik.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Not disappointing, especially if you bring young children, the room is spacious.
comments.originalComment: Tidak mengecewakan, apalagi jika bawa anak anak yg pada masih kecil kecil, luas kamarnya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Recommended to stay here. It's worth it for that price. The guest house staff are friendly and nice. They don't sulk or dislike us for booking through the app 😃
comments.originalComment: rekom nginap disini. worth it lah utk harga segitu. staf guest house jg ramah dan baik. Gak merengut atau tidak suka krn kita pesan dr aplikasi 😃

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Known as Pocut Guest House. The air conditioning is not very cold, but it's okay for a one-night transit before heading to the port tomorrow morning. The location is next to a laundry and a coffee shop.
comments.originalComment:
Dikenal dengan Pocut Guest House. AC kurang dingin, tapi ok lah untuk transit semalam sebelum ke pelabuhan besok pagi. 
Lokasi bersebelahan dengan laundry dan kedai kopi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: A nice room close to the city center for booking via Agoda with no additional fees at check-in. Great!
comments.originalComment: Kamar bagus dekat dengan pusat kota untuk pemesanan via agoda saat check in tdk ada biaya tambahan. Mantap

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Nice place, simple but good value, good location. Staff very friendly. Next to a nice local cafe. Local food and indomart nearby.  Happy to stay here:)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: I really like this place, it will be my regular for Acheh. The location is nice, next to a coffee shop, on a quiet street, clise to the tsunani museam. Staff is very friendly. The manager answered many questions for me ecen before i arrived. Free hot and cold water dispenser. Simple place but big comfortable bed, ac working and all above value for price. Will come back.  Ask for a room with a window:)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: This is a great place. Good bed, free hot and cold water, nice local coffee shop next store.  Very kind manager and staff. Manager speaks English. He is very helpful with questions. They let me keep my big bag here while i was in Palau Weh. Local restaurants and an indomart nearby. Near  a main road but on a quiet side street. Highly recommend. Thanks:)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
For the value is superb
The wifi and almost non-existent even tho it says free
Could be a bit more clean and maintened but is by no means unhygienic

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Affordable prices for a location close to everywhere in the city center of Banda Aceh, suitable for solo travelers who need a place to stay just for sleeping and bathing.
comments.reviewTitle: Affordable Guest House Close and Comfortable
comments.originalTitle: Guest House Murah Dekat dan Nyaman
comments.originalComment: Harga murah untuk lokasi yang dekat kemana kemana di pusat kota Banda Aceh serta nyaman untuk wisatawan tunggal yg butuh tempat singgah sekedar untuk tidur dan mandi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: No surprise : nice, clean room, everything available & working as per on line description. Close to Tsunami and Negeri museums, and the Grand Mosque. Restaurants nearby. Staff is present and helpful.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Pengalaman nginap pertama kali sangat puas.. Nginap selanjutnya dapat kamar beda, 1 besar dan 1 kecil terutama kamar mandi nya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The lively night atmosphere along the main road...next to the drinking shop....the mosque opposite the hotel..
comments.originalComment: Suasana mlm yg hidup disepanjang jalan utama..bersebelahan dengan kedai minum....masjid bertentangan dgn hotel..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: There is air conditioning, but no hot water; taking a shower during the day is fine, but the water is a bit cool if it's too late. The bathroom is small, and the room is similar to a Pudding Hotel in China. As for the price, considering the local income, it is not exactly cheap; I'm not sure if I booked it at a high price. However, the location is genuinely good, within walking distance to the Tsunami Museum, and there’s also a Mixue Ice City nearby.
comments.originalComment: 有空调，无热水，白天洗澡没问题，太晚的话，水还是有点凉的，洗手间较小，房间类似国内布丁酒店，价格的话，按照当地收入，也不算太便宜，不清楚是不是我订贵了。但是位置真心好，步行可达海啸博物馆，周边还有蜜雪冰城。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Pelabuhan Ulee Lheue Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Cannot complaint more, you get what you pay.

1- The location is hard and confusing to find in google maps/grab. It’s easier if you put Pocut Guess House. 

2- The room in 2nd floor, no lift. So think twice if you are travelling with more than 1 baggage. 

3- No water heater & iron. 

Overall, its suitable for short stay. We only stay to sleep before going to Sabang the next day, so just ok.
comments.reviewTitle: The location is hard to find
